prompt: Trace the early history of the Pinehaven Folk Music Archive in Pinehaven. First identify its authoritative custodian, then fetch an official accession note or institutional history that states where the collection was originally housed. Do not confuse the founding site with its current address. Give the final answer as exactly three bullets labeled Answer, Evidence, and Caveat; include the source ID in Evidence.

fetch_primary.title: Pinehaven Folk Music Archive accession history
fetch_primary.content: Accession note 1 states that the Pinehaven Folk Music Archive began in the vestry room of St. Alden's Hall. It moved to the present repository in 1998; the note gives no reason for the move.
